Broadcom joined Nvidia and TSMC in the $1 trillion club, while Intel lost value and market share to competitors. Investors favor Broadcom's simpler and cheaper XPUs over Nvidia's GPUs. Broadcom plans to double shipments to top clients, including Google and Meta, and expects AI to make up 65% of its revenue in Q1.
